description_long: This is a modern smartphone with a sleek, metallic brown body and a large, edge-to-edge display on the front. The back of the phone features a striking design with a large, realistic blue feather surrounded by a yellow glow, giving it a unique and artistic appearance. The rear camera module is located in the top left corner and consists of two lenses and a flash, all housed in a slightly raised, square-shaped bump. The sides of the phone are smooth and rounded, with visible buttons likely for volume and power control. The front display shows a colorful, abstract wallpaper with a logo and the text '504471 PIXEL' in the center. The overall build appears solid and premium, typical of high-end smartphones used in urban environments.
description: A metallic brown smartphone with a blue feather design on the back, dual rear cameras, and a vibrant front display featuring a logo and abstract wallpaper.
description_view_0: Back view showing the blue feather design, dual camera module, and metallic brown finish.
description_view_1: Side profile highlighting the slim, rounded edge and button placements.
description_view_2: Front view displaying the large screen with colorful wallpaper and a central logo.
description_view_3: Opposite side profile, showing the phone's thinness and smooth edge.
attribute_brand_logo: A logo with the text '504471 PIXEL' and a stylized atomic symbol is visible on the front display, centered on the screen. No permanent brand logo is visible on the exterior body.
attribute_screen_display_content: The screen displays a colorful, abstract wallpaper with rounded shapes in blue, purple, and pink hues. In the center, there is a logo featuring an atomic symbol and the text '504471 PIXEL'. No app icons, widgets, or notifications are visible.
attribute_camera_placement: There are two camera lenses and a flash arranged in a triangular pattern within a square bump located at the top left corner on the back of the phone.
attribute_button_layout: Physical buttons are visible along the right edge of the phone, likely including a power button and volume rocker. No buttons are present on the front or left edge.
